flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Helena College University of Montana fell 26% between 2006 and 2009 (35.4% → 26.3%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Helena College University of Montana rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.5k → $4.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Helena College University of Montana rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.6k → $11.3k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Helena College University of Montana fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (61.7% → 54.7%).
